title: System Startup
description: The system must start and listen on the configured port.
acceptance_criteria: Server binds to configured port;Health check endpoint responds within 5 seconds;Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM

title: REST API CRUD
description: The system must provide REST API endpoints for CRUD operations on items.
acceptance_criteria: POST /items creates a new item;GET /items/:id returns item details;GET /items returns paginated list;DELETE /items/:id removes item

title: Request Validation
description: All API requests must be validated before processing.
acceptance_criteria: Required fields are checked;Invalid input returns 400 with error message;Central error handling for all routes

title: User Authentication
description: Users must authenticate with secure password handling.
acceptance_criteria: Passwords hashed with HMAC-SHA256;Salt used for each password;Constant-time comparison
